name: Cape Cod Cranberry Bread Bake
recipeInstructions:
From Massachusetts' Cape. Delightfully different for Thanksgiving,
Finely grate the peel from the orange. Remove the skin and membranes for
the orange. Section the orange and cut each section across into thin
slices. Combine the orange peel, orange slices, cranberries 2 cups sugar
and water in a medium saucepan. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
Simmer covered for 10 minutes. Remove lid and continue to cook until
slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
Preheat oven to 325°F. Beat eggs with cinnamon in a large bowl until
light. Beat in remaining 3/4 cup sugar, milk, heavy cream, Grand Marnier
liqueur and vanilla. Place layer of bread at bottom of buttered 2 quart
souffle dish. Using ladle, pour enough egg mixture to cover the bread.
Spoon one third of all cranberry mixture over top. Repeat layers two more
times, adding remaining egg mixture to dish before spooning on last third
of cranberries. Bake until firm, about 1 hour. Serve slightly warm or at
room temperature with heavy cream. SERVES:8
SOURCE: As American as Apple Pie
